Nodes.PromptText: Hi, I'm Rex. \nNice moves, I'm impressed. It is not easy hiding in a cargo ship. Say, how did you do it?

Options.Text: I don't really feel like telling you any of my secrets. If you'll excuse me, I need to go now.
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:46:55.9780554Z, selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:47:00.8648673Z; captured text is visible answer-list text, not verified NPC prompt text.
KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:46:55.9780554Z; branch was visible but not selected in this capture.

Nodes.PromptText:
You have it all figured out, don't you? I bet you forgot that you need an ID card to enter ICC. I don't even need glasses to notice that you don't have anything of value...

Rex lowers his voice.

You know, I arrived here the same way as you just did. I might know a guy that can help you out... I got a fake ID myself.

Options.Text: Who said I don't have any ID?
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:01.9349845Z, selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:47:04.7744986Z; captured text is visible answer-list text, not verified NPC prompt text.

Options.Text: Tell me who to talk to.
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:01.9349845Z; branch was visible but not selected in this capture.
KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:01.9349845Z; branch was visible but not selected in this capture.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Nodes.PromptText: Alright there, boss, say what you want. Just know that if you don't have any form of identification, your options are limited. You can either take a quick stroll \n\nOr.. you could get my help getting an ID, if you start helping me out here instead of denying facts...

Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:05.8448062Z, selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:47:06.6539321Z; captured text is visible answer-list text, not verified NPC prompt text.
KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:05.8448062Z; branch was visible but not selected in this capture.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Nodes.PromptText: Ya see these Cleaning Robots? They are old, stupid and broken now. I need you to terminate them and open the cargo box with the new ones so they can start cleaning up this place... It looks messy here, don't you agree?

Options.Text: I'll do it if you promise to tell me who your contact is.
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:07.6040523Z, selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:47:09.1035673Z; captured text is visible answer-list text, not verified NPC prompt text.
KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:07.6040523Z; branch was visible but not selected in this capture.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Nodes.PromptText: Excellent choice, I will tell you what you need to know when you have completed the task.

Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:47:10.2447301Z; no answer event before captured close at 2026-06-15T00:47:14.1537625Z.

Actions.Text: Safe close action for captured Goodbye option.

Options.Text: I've done what you asked. Can you tell me who your contact is?

Nodes.PromptText: I've had my fun watching you do my job. You didn't actually believe that I got a fake ID from someone here, did you? The only person I know around here is Marcus Stone, you could try asking him.

Options.Text: I can see why you don't have too many friends.
Options.TextEvidence: KnuBotAnswerList 2026-06-15T00:49:04.8888429Z, selected answer index 0 at 2026-06-15T00:49:05.5879767Z; captured text is visible answer-list text, not verified NPC prompt text.

Nodes.PromptText: Off you go, I need to relax now. It has been a long day at work.
